title: Add F-WIN-05: satellite focus race on multi-monitor
agent_notes: Three files updated together: primary failure record added, synthesis index cross-reference updated, and decision log entry added. All touch the same incident.

file_changes.rationale: Primary failure record — adds F-WIN-05 as a new confirmed failure pattern for satellite window focus races on multi-monitor setups.
file_changes.before:
# Tauri Window Management Failures

Known failure modes for Tauri window focus and positioning.
file_changes.after:
# Tauri Window Management Failures

Known failure modes for Tauri window focus and positioning.

## F-WIN-05: Satellite focus race on multi-monitor

When the satellite window is opened on a secondary monitor while the primary window has focus, a race condition causes the satellite to lose focus immediately after creation. Observed on Windows 11 with DPI scaling > 100%.

file_changes.rationale: Synthesis index — adds cross-reference entry for F-WIN-05 under the window management section.

- F-WIN-03: Resize race on restore
file_changes.after:
